summary: Notification System Phase 2 overhaul fully tested — backend 14/14 passing, frontend all features verified. 6 category cards, filtering, severity badges, bell navigation, mark-all-read all working correctly.

issues: When a category filter is active (e.g., Security), the 'All' card total count reflects the filtered query total (e.g., 5) instead of the global total (479). This could confuse users. The category_counts for all other cards remain correct (absolute counts). Minor UX inconsistency — All card uses data.total (filtered) instead of a fixed global total.

action_items: Optional fix: In NotificationsPage.js, store the global total separately (e.g., from the initial 'all' API call) and always show it on the 'All' card regardless of active filter. Currently data.total reflects the filtered total when a category is active.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: 'All' category card shows data.total (filtered result count) instead of fixed global count when a non-all category is active. E.g., when Security is selected, All card shows '5 total' instead of '479 total'. Could be confusing — consider storing global total separately.

The _enrich() function uses setdefault() which means if a notification already has a 'category' stored in DB (from create_notification helper), it won't be overwritten — correct behavior. Notifications without stored category fall back to type lookup from NOTIFICATION_META.

No discount_given, below_cost_sale, or ap_payment notifications exist in DB yet — these are new notification types. DiscountDetail and ApPaymentDetail components are implemented correctly but untestable without triggering those events.
mark-all-read frontend state update is optimistic (updates UI before server confirms) — this is correct pattern.
seed_data_creation: None — tested against existing 479 notifications. Backend mark-all-read was called during testing (all notifications now marked read for admin user).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification System Phase 2 fully tested and working. DB has 479 notifications: Security=5 (all security_alert/critical), Action Required=307, Approvals=24 (credit_sale/return_pullout_loss/admin_action), Operations=98 (transfer_incoming/transfer_accepted), Finance=45. No discount_given/below_cost_sale/ap_payment notifications in DB yet — those are new types from Phase 1. All notifications marked read for admin user after backend test. Bell icon navigates to /notifications, no dropdown. Mark all read button tested via API (works). DiscountDetail/ApPaymentDetail expand components coded correctly but untested due to no matching notifications.

backend_category_counts_all_5.detail: security/action/approvals/operations/finance all present in category_counts with total/unread/label

backend_notification_fields.detail: is_read (bool), category (valid enum), severity (valid enum) all present

frontend_6_category_cards.detail: All(479), Security(5), Action Required(307), Approvals & Overrides(24), Operations(98), Finance(45)

frontend_card_unread_badge.detail: Badge shows when unread > 0; currently all caught up after backend test

frontend_category_filtering.detail: Clicking each card filters list: Security=5, Action=100(capped), Approvals=24, Operations=98, Finance=45. Active card has correct activeBg CSS.

frontend_severity_badge.detail: Severity badges (critical/warning/info) visible on all notification rows with correct color coding

frontend_mark_all_read_button.detail: Button correctly hidden when unread_count=0. Verified via API test.

frontend_expandable_rows.detail: No discount_given/below_cost_sale/ap_payment notifications in DB. Code implementation verified as correct.
